creator: asapp.com

evidence.text: Insights Agent can trigger a Discovery cycle because it reads the same interaction data Discovery Agent analyzes. Optimization Agent can make precise improvements because Developer Agent built workflows as structured graphs of isolated states, not monolithic prompts where every change affects everything. Simulation Agent can verify Optimization Agent's changes because both operate on the same workflow representation.

title: The autonomous agentic life-cycle: how the ASAPP CXP flywheel works - ASAPP
